Comments: Multiple reports of a large multi-vortex tornado. (LUB)
Reports of cyclical tornado by Lamb SO and spotters. (LUB)
[Landspout] A brief landspout formed in an open field northeast of Blytheville. No damage was observed. (MEG)
EF0 tornado confirmed north of Greenville... Ohio. Minor damage to a structure with estimated winds of 65 MPH. (ILN)
Fire fighter dispatch reports a tornado viewing from the intersection of FM 1058 and FM 1057. (AMA)
Preliminary report; noted debris in church parking lot across the street from the location reported. (AMA)
